title: Vo1dz’s PURPLE 16x CPVP PACK
description: 16x Purple CPVP Pack  – Smooth Crystal Gameplay, Classic 1.8.9 Feel!
body:
# Vo1dz's Purple 16x Crystal PvP Pack 💜⚔️

### **[Author's Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/Vo1dzz)**

[CurseForge Author](https://www.curseforge.com/members/vo1dz)



Take your **Crystal PvP** to the next level with this **Purple 16x PvP Pack**, built for players who want **clean visuals**, **smoother fights**, **and** **maximum performance**. With a sleek black **UI** and optimized textures, this pack is designed to help you stay focused during intense fights while keeping your game looking sharp.

## _✨ Features_
- **🔥 Low Fire** – See your opponent clearly, even when you're burning
- **🗿 Small Totems** – More screen space for better visibility in fights
- **🗡️ Small Swords** – Cleaner combat view for faster reactions
- **🛡️ Small Shield** – Improved visibility while blocking and fighting
- **💨 No Particles** – Less visual clutter for crystal placement and tracking
- **🖤 Black & Purple GUI 💜** – A stylish dark interface that looks clean and competitive

## _🚀 Why This Pack?_

In **competitive Crystal PvP**, every frame and every bit of visibility matters. This pack removes distractions and gives you a **cleaner PvP experience**, making it easier to track enemies, place crystals faster, and react instantly.

The **low fire** and **no particles** help you keep vision during chaotic fights, while the **small swords** and **small totems** open up your screen so you can focus on your opponent's movements. That extra visibility can make the difference between winning and losing.

With better visibility and cleaner textures, you'll land your crystals more consistently, improve your reaction time, and improve the mechanics needed to reach **HT1 level gameplay**. As your gameplay gets cleaner, your tier placement rises, helping you compete with stronger players and improve faster. 📈

And it’s not just for Crystal PvP — this pack is also great for **Sword** and **Axe**, giving you the same smooth visuals and reduced clutter so your aim, combos, and timing feel even better across all PvP modes. ⚔️🪓

##  _📸 Previews_

**Check out some screenshots of the pack in action! 👀✨**

Upgrade your PvP, sharpen your gameplay, and dominate the competition with this Purple 16x Crystal PvP Pack 💜
